function.name: prep_mise_en_place
function.description: Prepare ingredients and base components at the prep station.

function.name: cook_on_stovetop
function.description: Cook a dish or ingredient on the stovetop. Can fail — on failure, must re-prep and re-cook.

function.name: cook_in_oven
function.description: Cook a dish or ingredient in the oven. Can fail — on failure, must re-prep and re-cook.

function.name: plate_dish
function.description: Plate the completed dish with the received ingredient at the prep station.

function.name: prepare_ingredient
function.description: Prepare an ingredient for another chef's dish (uses stovetop or oven depending on ingredient). Can fail — on failure, must re-prepare.

for_chef.description: Which chef this ingredient is for
